case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. RONALD CULLEN

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-21-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RONALD CULLEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE FOR INSUFFICIENT INFORMATION. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
